---
name: Rejection pattern contribution
about: Add or correct an App Store or Google Play rejection pattern
title: "[pattern] "
labels: ["good first issue"]
---

## The rejection

What got rejected, and which guideline or policy did the store cite.

## The trigger

What in the app or the listing caused it.

## The fix

What cleared it.

## Source

A link to the live Apple or Google source, or the real rejection text. Every factual claim needs a source.
